relations.note: Mobile layout behavior is an extension requirement of the base text-heavy callout pattern.

quotes: three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section

rules.intent: Maintain visual hierarchy and prevent screen clutter from competing identical callout blocks.
rules.rule_text: Never use two callouts of the same style competing within a single screen or section. Choose strictly from the three approved callout patterns: Main, Secondary, or Text-heavy.

quotes: Bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text with Gold (#ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below. Centered text. [GENERAL: rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text.]

Main callout (key point): Bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text with Gold (#ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below. Centered text. [GENERAL: rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text.]

rules.intent: Standardize the treatment of key-point callouts.
rules.rule_text: The Main Callout style features centered Bold Brand Blue text (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) bound on the top and bottom by Gold (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) horizontal rules of 2px weight (border.rule.weight = 2px) spanning approximately 60–100% (size.rule.width = 60–100%) of the text block, spaced 16px (padding.rule.text_gap = 16px) from the text.

quotes: Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint with Bold Brand Blue text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). [GENERAL: 20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.]

Secondary/data callout: Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint with Bold Brand Blue text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). [GENERAL: 20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.]

rules.intent: Standardize secondary and data callouts with controlled dimensions and style signatures.
rules.rule_text: The Secondary/data callout uses a Light Blue background (color.tertiary.light_blue = #E6F0F9) at 70% opacity (opacity.callout.70 = 0.7), Bold Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) text, 20px internal padding (padding.secondary_callout.internal = 20px), and allows at most a single line icon.

quotes: Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint, Bold Brand Blue headline, line icons, Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads, Regular Graphite (#212121) body text. [GENERAL: 24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.]

Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions): Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint, Bold Brand Blue headline, line icons, Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads, Regular Graphite (#212121) body text. [GENERAL: 24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.]

rules.intent: Maintain readability and styling hierarchy in dense description blocks.
rules.rule_text: Text-heavy callouts for lists/descriptions use a Golden Sand background (color.tertiary.golden_sand = #FEF1C8) at 30% opacity (opacity.callout.golden_sand_box = 0.3) with 24px internal padding (padding.section.side = 24px). The hierarchy uses a Bold Brand Blue headline, line icons, Bold Sky Blue (color.secondary.sky_blue = #358CCB) subheads, and Regular Graphite (color.tertiary.graphite = #212121) body text.

quotes: two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.

rules.intent: Ensure readability and robust rendering of dense callouts on narrow screens.
rules.rule_text: On mobile viewports, the two-column icon+text layout within a text-heavy callout must collapse to a single column structure.
